title: taraxacum gibbosum
intro: Taraxacum gibbosum, also known as the Himalayan dandelion, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family, characterized by its hairy stems and broad, toothed leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum gibbosum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be consumed as a raw leafy green or used in capsule form, although its effectiveness and safety as a medicinal herb require further research and validation.
